audit_items.proof_trace: All BeaconState getters return deep copies (validatorsVal uses ethpb.CopyValidator, blockRootsVal uses roots.Slice with element copies, slashingsVal uses copy()). The protobuf struct s is populated with these copies, then passed to InitializeFromProtoUnsafeFulu which creates aliasing only between the new state and the temporary protobuf struct, not with the original input state.
